author: Ken Ross, Joshua Gould, Broad Institute
plan:
## WeightedVoting GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
WeightedVoting is a GenePattern module that Weighted Voting classification

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 11 parameters:
- Required: none
- Optional: train.filename, train.class.filename, saved.model.filename, model.file, test.filename, test.class.filename, num.features, feature.selection.statistic, min.std, feature.list.filename, pred.results.file

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -cp <libdir>gp-modules.jar org.genepattern.prediction.wv.WeightedVoting -t<train.filename> -c<train.class.filename> -T<test.filename> -C<test.class.filename> -o<pred.results.file> -s<saved.model.filename> -m<model.file> -n<num.features> -f<feature.list.filename> -S<feature.selection.statistic> -M<min.std>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: train.filename
parameters.description: training data file name - .gct, .res, .odf type \= Dataset, ignored if a saved model (saved.model.filename) is used

parameters.name: train.class.filename
parameters.description: class file for training data - .cls, ignored if a saved model (saved.model.filename) is used

parameters.name: saved.model.filename
parameters.description: input Weighted Voting model file - .odf type \= Weighted Voting Prediction Model

parameters.name: model.file
parameters.description: name of output Weighted Voting model file  - .odf type \= Weighted Voting Prediction Model

parameters.name: test.filename
parameters.description: test data file name - .gct, .res, .odf type \= Dataset

parameters.name: num.features
parameters.description: number of selected features if feature list filename is not specified

parameters.name: feature.selection.statistic
parameters.description: statistic to use to perform feature selection

parameters.name: min.std
parameters.description: minimum standard deviation if feature selection statistic includes min std option

parameters.name: pred.results.file
parameters.description: name of prediction results output file - .odf type \= Prediction Results
